## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Auth0's retail strategy and offerings to inform GrowthX's SDR enablement efforts for Okta/Auth0.](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Auth0 has strong traction in retail, especially with larger retailers (avg. $1M ARR per account)](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Key differentiators: scalability, omnichannel support, loyalty program integration, peak traffic management](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Main challenge: Perceived as expensive, but provides revenue-driving benefits beyond just security](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [AI integration and personalization are major trends/opportunities in retail identity management](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)

## Topics

### Auth0's Retail Market Position

  - [Significant portion of Auth0's business comes from retail industry](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Average account size of $1M ARR in retail vertical](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Strong brand awareness but cost can be a major hurdle for some prospects](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=637.0)
  - [Particularly successful in travel/hospitality sub-vertical (e.g. airlines, hotels)](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

### Key Differentiators for Retail

  - [Scalability to handle large customer bases](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Omnichannel support (online, in-store, Alexa, Instagram, AI bots)](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [Loyalty program integration and simplified sign-up](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Peak traffic management (e.g. product launches, holiday shopping)](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Regulatory compliance (GDPR, CCPA, PCI DSS)](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Personalization and customer data management capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)

### Retail Sub-Verticals

1.  General retail and e-commerce
2.  Travel and hospitality (hotels, airlines)
3.  Grocery, food and beverage (including restaurants)
4.  Wholesale (B2B retail, e.g. Nike selling to Macy's)

### Current Retail Trends and Challenges

  - [AI integration: Retailers want to implement but have concerns around data privacy/security](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Personalization: Growing demand but challenged by identity management limitations](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Security threats: Increasing sophisticated attacks, especially AI-powered bots](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Auth0's Value Proposition

  - [Revenue-driving benefits beyond security (e.g. easier checkouts, more loyalty sign-ups)](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Secure AI transactions and applications](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Simplifies identity management so dev teams can focus on core product](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Stays current with evolving regulations, protocols, and features](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Sales Challenges and Strategies

  - [Security teams familiar with Auth0, but need to educate CMOs/digital heads on identity's role](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [In-house solutions are main competitor; emphasize resource savings and expertise of Auth0](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Highlight revenue potential to counter price objections (e.g. increased conversions, loyalty)](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to refine SDR enablement artifacts based on insights shared](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - [Bradford to review and comment on existing GrowthX-created retail-specific documents](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
  - [Bradford to send additional decks/materials to support GrowthX's efforts](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=2133.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop example workflows showing how artifacts can be used in sales process](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=2183.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up with Rachel (Okta) to align on next steps and review progress](https://fathom.video/share/dDuNAtJhhdcPkFXdXnS5HuHC3G3zKsFd?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
